definitions: 使分心；转移（某人的）注意力

examples.text: Cackling with glee, Sun Wukong proudly marked his territory. Returning to the Buddha, he demanded his new title— but he was distracted by a familiar odor. Looking back, he was shocked to find he'd never left the Buddha's hand. Suddenly, those five fingers transformed into a mountain range,
examples.explanation: 这里 distracted 表示“分心的、注意力被转移的”。孙悟空本来在向佛祖要求新称号，但被熟悉的气味吸引，注意力被打断。

source.text: The tale of the Monkey King and the Buddha - Ji Hao
